caption:
True or false: A Facebook page is enough for your business in 2026?

FALSE. And here's why it matters to your bottom line.

Facebook controls your reach. Algorithm changes can cut your visibility overnight — and there's nothing you can do about it.

A website gives you:
✓ Google discoverability (people searching for you)
✓ 24/7 lead capture (while you sleep)
✓ Professional credibility (before they ever contact you)
✓ Your own platform — not rented land

The best businesses in Mauritius have both. Don't pick one.

→ Start from Rs 8,000 at bienzoli.com

#DigitalMarketing #MauritiusBusiness #WebsiteVsFacebook #GrowYourBusiness

templateData.question: Is a Facebook page enough for your business?
templateData.answer1Title: Yes — Facebook has millions of users
templateData.answer1Desc: Facebook reach is free and your customers are already there. What else do you need?
templateData.answer2Title: No — you're building on rented land
templateData.answer2Desc: Facebook controls your reach. Algorithm changes, account bans, and ad costs are all outside your control. A website is yours.
templateData.answer3Desc: Some businesses can survive on social only — but they're leaving Google traffic, credibility, and leads on the table.
templateData.footerNote: Own your platform. Build a real website.
